title: willdenowia rugosa
intro: Willdenowia rugosa, also known as the needle fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aspidiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing relief from digestive issues. Willdenowia rugosa is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil for medicinal purposes.
